project: Rural Routes Explorer v35D PWA Parity Seed

quests.title: Turtle Trail
quests.subtitle: Public art hunt with 12 Caldwell turtles

quests.title: Mural Quest
quests.subtitle: Find Caldwell murals through visual clues

quests.title: Historic Caldwell
quests.subtitle: Border Queen stories, old west locations, and local history

quests.title: Local Rewards
quests.subtitle: Business rewards tied to nearby discoveries and buy-local stops

pwaIntegrations.maps: Use Mapbox/MapLibre or Google Maps. Must show user position, heading if available, quest pins, highlighted active target, and orange target-bearing arrow after Direction Hint/Reveal.
pwaIntegrations.gps: Use browser Geolocation API with watchPosition. Require HTTPS. Store permission state and graceful fallback for unsupported heading.
pwaIntegrations.haptics: Use navigator.vibrate where supported. iOS Safari/PWA has limited/no vibration support; provide visual heartbeat/signal fallback.
pwaIntegrations.qr: Use camera scanner library such as html5-qrcode, zxing-js/browser, or jsQR. QR payload should resolve to a Supabase qrcodes/promotions row, not hardcode rewards.
pwaIntegrations.storage: Supabase Storage for card images, turtle photos, artist photos, QR signs, badges.
pwaIntegrations.auth: Supabase Auth for persistent traveler profiles; localStorage only for demo mode.
